    {{ call .T "sms.how.step3.title" }}

    {{ call .T "sms.how.step3.desc" }}

    {{ call .T "sms.faq.title" }}

    SMS Receiver provides virtual phone numbers to receive SMS verification codes online. No real phone number required.

    Prices start from $0.01 per SMS depending on the service and country. Check our pricing page for details.

    We support 700+ services including WhatsApp, Telegram, Google, Facebook, TikTok, Instagram, Twitter/X, and many more.

    You have 20 minutes to receive the verification code. If you don't receive it within this time, you can cancel the order and get a refund.

    No, each number is for single use only. After receiving the SMS, the number is released back to the pool.

    {{- template "partials/ad_slot.html" dict "SlotID" "sms-landing-bottom" "Size" "728x90" "Mobile" "320x50" "ClientID" .AdsClientID "Enabled" .AdsEnabled }}
    {{- end }}
